summary: Iter 53 — Frontend-only bug fix: Araç Masraf tile now derived from REAL vehicle-expense transactions (car_id present + non-excluded category) instead of formula 'Toplam − Sermaye − NetKâr'. Backend regression PASS 20/20 (iter50+51+52). Frontend e2e PASS — tile renders ₺0 initially (matches 0 vehicle-expense tx via API), updates to ₺1.500 after creating Bakım expense, excludes Araç Alımı correctly, returns to ₺0 after cleanup. Color stays amber, never red. Tooltip Turkish text correct.
passed_tests: Frontend: initial vehicleExpensesTotal=0 — tile shows ₺0 (matches API: 0 expense tx with car_id+non-excluded category)
Frontend: tile element data-testid='capital-tile-aracmasraf' has tooltip title='Araçlara yapılan gider toplamı (bakım, onarım, boya, ekspertiz vb.) — alış bedeli ve sahibine ödeme hariç'
Frontend: tile color is amber (text-amber-500 class present, text-destructive absent) at zero value
Frontend e2e: POST /api/transactions {type:expense, car_id:<existing>, category:'Bakım', amount:1500} → reload Dashboard → tile updates to ₺1.500 ✓
Frontend e2e: POST /api/transactions {type:expense, car_id:<existing>, category:'Araç Alımı', amount:99999} → reload Dashboard → tile STILL ₺1.500 (excluded category does NOT contribute) ✓
Frontend e2e: DELETE both tx → tile returns to ₺0 (cleanup verified)
Tile color remains amber across all transitions (zero / positive / after cleanup) — no destructive/red state observed
No console errors / pageerrors during dashboard load (only pre-existing benign Recharts width(-1) warning on hidden tabs)
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx:83-88 — vehicleExpensesTotal useMemo correctly filters: type==='expense' AND car_id present AND category NOT IN ('Araç Alımı','Araç Sahibine Ödeme'). Uses activeTransactions (all-time, no date filter) — appropriate for capital baseline. Memoization key is correct.

/app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/CapitalSummaryCard.jsx:15,29-31 — prop renamed to vehicleExpenses (was derived); aracMasraf now = Number(vehicleExpenses||0). No fallback to old formula (clean break). Default prop 0 safe.

/app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/CapitalSummaryCard.jsx:127-137 — tile color hardcoded amber (border-amber-500/30, bg-amber-500/5, text-amber-500). Previous red-on-negative branch removed. Tooltip updated to 'Araçlara yapılan gider toplamı...' — semantically correct since value is now always >=0 (expense amounts can't be negative).

Minor (non-blocking): The aracMasraf value uses ALL-TIME transactions while netProfit uses date-filtered filteredSoldCars. This is intentional per E1's note ('sermaye kartı baseline gösterir'), but worth documenting in code comment that the tile intentionally ignores the dashboard date filter. Current code comment at line 82 already covers this.
Minor (UX): tooltip is HTML title attribute (browser-native) — not consistent with other tiles using StatCard with custom tooltip prop. Consider unifying in future iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all assertions pass — initial 0, create-update flow, excluded-category filtering, cleanup-revert)

test_credentials.note: admin role; org has 5 active cars + 0 vehicle-expense tx initially

seed_data_creation: E2E test self-created 2 transactions (1 Bakım + 1 Araç Alımı) and DELETED both at end. Final state of org is identical to pre-test state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 53: Araç Masraf tile (capital-tile-aracmasraf) now uses real tx data via prop vehicleExpenses (computed in Dashboard.jsx as vehicleExpensesTotal). Backend unchanged. Contract: tile value = sum(tx where type='expense' AND car_id AND category NOT IN ('Araç Alımı','Araç Sahibine Ödeme') AND !deleted). To re-test: login → Genel Bakış → read tile.inner_text; create expense tx via API and reload to verify. Test command: cd /app/backend && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) python -m pytest tests/test_iter52_founding_capital.py tests/test_iter51_sold_by_fields.py tests/test_iter50_full_regression.py -v
rca of the issue: N/A — iter53 bug fix verified working end-to-end. Previous bug (tile showed ₺9.965.570 from formula derivation) is resolved: tile now sources from real vehicle-expense transactions.
